name: Logitech USB Webcam Audio
quirks: Webcam microphones are acceptable fallbacks when they keep Bluetooth headphones on A2DP, but dedicated USB microphones should rank higher.
Do not match generic Logitech receivers or mice; this profile requires webcam or microphone identity text.
source_notes: Seeded as a common UVC/UAC webcam audio endpoint profile.
Local USB inventory includes Logitech devices that are not audio endpoints, so matching is intentionally narrow.
